dashboard.title: Marley Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Reverse vaccinology and drug discovery for canine visceral leishmaniasis.
dashboard.newAnalysisSubtitle: Configure and launch a pipeline run
dashboard.newAnalysisSubtext: Choose a pipeline, configure parameters, and launch your run in minutes.

vaccineConstruct.title: Vaccine Construct
vaccineConstruct.description: Multi-epitope mRNA vaccine with 11 epitopes, VaxiJen 0.3235

molecularDocking.title: Molecular Docking
molecularDocking.description: 10 compounds screened across 5 targets, best hit CHEMBL92 at -8.07 kcal/mol

asoTherapy.title: ASO Therapy
asoTherapy.description: MRL-ASO-001 validated 90/100, 0 viable escape mutations predicted

targetValidation.title: Target Validation
targetValidation.description: SL RNA target validation — conservation, selectivity, and entropy analysis across 500 transcripts

vaccine.title: Vaccine Construct
vaccine.subtitle: Multi-epitope mRNA vaccine design for canine visceral leishmaniasis

antigenicity.title: Antigenicity Assessment
antigenicity.notComputed: VaxiJen score not computed for this construct
antigenicity.disclaimer: The VaxiJen server has size limitations for constructs >100 amino acids. Individual epitopes were selected based on predicted immunogenicity via NetMHCpan 4.1. Full-construct antigenicity requires experimental validation (ELISA/ELISPOT).

ic50Chart.title: Epitope IC50 Distribution
ic50Chart.subtitle: Binding affinity per epitope (nM) — lower is better

epitopeTable.title: Epitope Table
epitopeTable.subtitle: {count} unique MHC-I binders linked by GPGPG/AAY linkers

structure3d.title: 3D Structure Prediction (ESMFold)
structure3d.subtitle: ESMFold-predicted structure of the {length}-residue construct with {count} unique epitopes
structure3d.altText: Predicted 3D structure of the multi-epitope vaccine construct via ESMFold

drug.title: Drug Targets
drug.subtitle: Parasite-specific druggable targets identified through comparative genomics

leadCandidate.name: MRL-003
leadCandidate.warning: Requires selectivity optimization — binds human GR with higher affinity than TryR

dataSources.title: Data Sources
dataSources.text: Targets identified from L. infantum JPCM5 proteome (TriTrypDB). Human orthologs from UniProt. Identity Score = % sequence identity to nearest human ortholog via BLASTp (lower = more parasite-specific = safer target). Druggability scoring based on target essentiality, structural druggability, and pathway context.

docking.title: Molecular Docking
docking.subtitle: AutoDock Vina virtual screening — {compounds} compounds across {targets} targets

selectivity.title: Selectivity Analysis
selectivity.subtitle: L. infantum TryR vs human glutathione reductase (GR). Selective threshold: 1.5 kcal/mol difference.
selectivity.warning: None of the tested compounds showed parasite selectivity. Further structural optimization is needed.

gmps.title: GMPS + Methotrexate Pose
gmps.subtitle: Best docking pose in the GMPS binding pocket · Rendered with PyMOL
gmps.altText: Docking pose of methotrexate in the GMPS active site

tryr.title: TryR + MRL-003 Docking
tryr.subtitle: Custom molecule MRL-003 (-7.74 kcal/mol) in the TryR binding site
tryr.altText: MRL-003 docked into trypanothione reductase active site

aso.title: ASO Therapy
aso.subtitle: Antisense oligonucleotide targeting Spliced Leader RNA of L. infantum

bioSim.title: MRL-ASO-001 Bio-Sim: Mechanism of Action
bioSim.subtitle: Interactive 3D journey from subcutaneous injection to parasite clearance — 8 scenes, 24 validated metrics

duplexStructure.title: ASO:SL RNA Duplex Structure
duplexStructure.subtitle: RoseTTAFold-predicted A-form hybrid duplex — Chain A (SL RNA, teal) · Chain B (MRL-ASO-001, rose)

molecule.title: Molecule: {name}
molecule.subtitle: {length}-mer antisense oligonucleotide with LNA gapmer design

rna.title: Target Validation
rna.subtitle: Computational validation of Spliced Leader RNA as an antisense oligonucleotide target

slCard.title: Spliced Leader RNA Sequence
slCard.description: 39-nt conserved sequence, absent in human transcriptome — primary target for antisense oligonucleotide therapy

entropyChart.title: Shannon Entropy Profile
entropyChart.subtitle: Top 15 genes by Shannon entropy (bits) — higher entropy indicates more sequence complexity

comparisonChart.title: Parasite vs Human Entropy
comparisonChart.subtitle: Comparing Shannon entropy between L. infantum and human orthologs — delta reveals divergent targets

targetsTable.title: Top RNA Targets
targetsTable.subtitle: {count} ranked targets sorted by entropy delta (parasite - human divergence)

codonChart.title: Codon Usage Comparison
codonChart.subtitle: Top 20 codons with largest RSCU (Relative Synonymous Codon Usage) difference between L. infantum and human — reveals codon bias for ASO design

platforms.title: Vaccine Platforms
platforms.subtitle: Cross-platform comparison of 3 production systems for the Marley multi-epitope vaccine

radarChart.title: Multi-Axis Platform Comparison
radarChart.subtitle: Normalized scores (0-1) across 6 strategic axes for each production platform

comparisonTable.title: Detailed Platform Comparison
comparisonTable.subtitle: Construct properties, production parameters, and logistics across all 3 platforms

costChart.title: Cost per Dose Comparison
costChart.subtitle: Lab-scale vs industrial-scale cost per dose (USD) across production platforms

asoCompatibility.title: ASO Compatibility
asoCompatibility.subtitle: Compatibility with MRL-ASO-001 antisense oligonucleotide therapy

references.title: References
references.tarentolae: L. tarentolae expression: Breitling et al., Protein Expression and Purification, 2002
references.ecoli: E. coli recombinant: Leish-Tec (Hertape Calier) as regulatory precedent

data.missing_input.title: Input Data Not Found
data.missing_input.body: A required input file for this analysis step was not found. This usually means a previous step did not complete.
data.missing_input.suggestion: Re-run the pipeline from the beginning, or check that upstream stages succeeded.

data.invalid_format.title: Invalid Data Format
data.invalid_format.body: An input file could not be read because it has an unexpected format.
data.invalid_format.suggestion: Verify that input files have not been modified manually.

data.empty_result.title: No Results Found
data.empty_result.body: This analysis step completed but found no matching results. The filtering criteria may be too restrictive.
data.empty_result.suggestion: Try adjusting the pipeline parameters (e.g., lower thresholds).

network.timeout.title: Server Timeout
network.timeout.body: A request to an external server timed out.
network.timeout.suggestion: Check your internet connection and try again. External databases may be temporarily overloaded.

network.connection_refused.title: Connection Failed
network.connection_refused.body: Could not connect to an external service required by this analysis step.
network.connection_refused.suggestion: Verify your internet connection and firewall settings.

network.dns_failure.title: DNS Resolution Failed
network.dns_failure.body: The server address could not be resolved.
network.dns_failure.suggestion: Check your network configuration and DNS settings.

network.api_error.title: External Service Error
network.api_error.body: An external bioinformatics service returned an error.
network.api_error.suggestion: The service may be temporarily unavailable. Try again later.

network.ssl_error.title: Secure Connection Failed
network.ssl_error.body: Could not establish a secure connection to an external service.
network.ssl_error.suggestion: This may be caused by a corporate proxy or firewall. Contact your network administrator.

compute.out_of_memory.title: Insufficient Memory
compute.out_of_memory.body: The system ran out of memory while processing this step.
compute.out_of_memory.suggestion: Try reducing the dataset size in pipeline parameters.

compute.numerical_error.title: Computation Error
compute.numerical_error.body: A numerical calculation produced an invalid result.
compute.numerical_error.suggestion: Check your input data for extreme or missing values.

compute.timeout.title: Computation Timeout
compute.timeout.body: This analysis step exceeded its time limit.
compute.timeout.suggestion: Try reducing the dataset size or increasing the timeout parameter.

compute.subprocess_failed.title: External Tool Error
compute.subprocess_failed.body: An external bioinformatics tool exited with an error.
compute.subprocess_failed.suggestion: Check that the tool is properly installed and that input data is valid.

config.invalid_parameter.title: Invalid Parameter
config.invalid_parameter.body: One of the pipeline parameters has an incorrect value or type.
config.invalid_parameter.suggestion: Review the parameters used for this run and correct the invalid value.

config.missing_parameter.title: Missing Parameter
config.missing_parameter.body: A required pipeline parameter was not provided.
config.missing_parameter.suggestion: Check the preset configuration or add the missing parameter.

config.preset_not_found.title: Preset Not Found
config.preset_not_found.body: The selected organism preset does not exist.
config.preset_not_found.suggestion: Use the pipeline wizard to see available presets.

dependency.module_missing.title: Missing Software Package
dependency.module_missing.body: A required Python package is not installed in the pipeline environment.

dependency.tool_missing.title: Missing External Tool
dependency.tool_missing.body: A required bioinformatics tool is not installed on this system.
dependency.tool_missing.suggestion: See the Methods page for a list of required software.

permission.file_access.title: File Permission Denied
permission.file_access.body: The pipeline could not read or write a required file.

permission.api_auth.title: Authentication Failed
permission.api_auth.body: An API key or credential was rejected by an external service.
permission.api_auth.suggestion: Verify that API keys are correctly set in the .env file.

internal.assertion.title: Internal Error
internal.assertion.body: An internal consistency check failed. This is likely a software bug.
internal.assertion.suggestion: Please report this issue with the run ID and technical details.

internal.unknown.title: Unexpected Error
internal.unknown.body: An unexpected error occurred during this analysis step.
internal.unknown.suggestion: Check the technical details below. If the issue persists, report it with your run ID.

fallback.title: Error
fallback.suggestion: Check the technical details for more information.

errors.stalledWarning: Your analysis is taking longer than expected. This can happen with large datasets. If it does not complete within a few minutes, you can cancel and try again.

wizard.title: New Analysis
wizard.step1Title: What would you like to analyze?
wizard.step1Subtitle: Select a pipeline to get started. Each one produces different results.
wizard.step2Subtitle: Presets are pre-configured parameter sets optimized for common research scenarios.
wizard.step3Subtitle: These defaults work well for most analyses. Only change them if you know what you are doing.
wizard.step4Subtitle: Everything looks good? Launch your analysis.

runs.title: Pipeline Runs
runs.subtitle: All pipeline executions and their results
runs.failedBanner: Your {pipeline} analysis encountered an issue. The technical details have been saved.

empty.title: No analyses yet
empty.subtitle: Start your first analysis to see results here.

newRun.title: Configure New Run
newRun.subtitle: Select a pipeline, choose a preset, and customize parameters. Then copy the CLI command to execute.
newRun.cliNote: Pipeline execution runs via CLI. Copy the command and run it in your terminal.

detail.title: Run Details
detail.stalled: This run may have stalled. Check the log file for details.
detail.stalledBody: Your analysis is taking longer than expected. If it does not complete within a few minutes, you can cancel and try again.

compare.title: Compare Runs
compare.selectPrompt: Select two runs to compare their parameters and results.
